brand.name: SHOTPHOO
brand.footer: © 2026 SHOTPHOO. Creative ecosystem, marketplace, and agency operating system.

seo.homeDescription: SHOTPHOO combines agency services, marketplace products, freelance talent, project intake, and admin operations.
seo.servicesDescription: SEO-ready service landing pages for web development, branding, content, social media, and AI automation.
seo.portfolioDescription: Logo design, photography, web design, branding, and content creation portfolio.
seo.marketplaceDescription: Browse templates, presets, UI kits, ebooks, plugins, reviews, cart, checkout, and downloads.
seo.adminDescription: Manage users, projects, products, blog posts, requests, messages, sales, leads, and analytics.

home.title: SHOTPHOO builds premium digital ecosystems.
home.body: A multilingual platform for clients, freelancers, sellers, editors, and operators to launch brands, products, campaigns, and software with one cinematic operating system.
home.servicesTitle: Built like a luxury agency. Operated like SaaS.
home.servicesBody: Every service page is structured for SEO, conversion, packages, FAQs, and project intake.
home.portfolioTitle: Signals of taste across craft categories.
home.commerceBody: Templates, presets, UI kits, ebooks, plugins, reviews, downloads, cart, checkout, and order history.
home.opsTitle: One platform for the whole creative company.
home.developmentTitle: Internal ventures moving through the studio.

services.pageTitle: Premium production lines for serious launches.
includedItems: Technical discovery, positioning, roadmap, and launch architecture.
Conversion-focused UI, content SEO, structured metadata, and analytics plan.
Production workflow, QA checklist, documentation, and post-launch support.
services.packageBody: Ideal for teams that need a clear scope, commercial polish, and a measurable launch path.
services.faqBody: Timeline, assets, collaboration rhythm, payment milestones, and ownership are clarified during discovery.

request.body: Submissions are validated and saved through the project request API for admin review.

join.title: Choose your path into the ecosystem.

paths.title: Freelancer Registration
paths.body: Create a talent profile, skills list, portfolio, experience level, and verification status.

paths.title: Seller Registration
paths.body: Publish templates, presets, UI kits, ebooks, plugins, reviews, and download products.

paths.title: Job Application
paths.body: Apply for internal agency roles, creative production, support, editorial, and engineering.

freelance.title: Project board, proposals, chat, and delivery states.
freelance.statusBody: Projects move through open, in progress, completed, cancelled, with proposal and conversation records connected in Prisma.

proposal.title: Send a project proposal.
proposal.body: Set your price, timeline, cover letter, and portfolio so the client can review your offer.
proposal.coverPlaceholder: Explain your approach, milestones, deliverables, and why you are the right fit.
proposal.priceHelp: Offer a clear fixed price or milestone budget.
proposal.timelineHelp: Describe your delivery schedule and review rounds.
proposal.fileHelp: Attach a relevant portfolio sample or proposal PDF.

blog.title: SEO content engine for the agency.
blog.body: Author, comments, related posts, schema, tags, and newsletter capture are modeled.
posts: A founder guide to marketplace SEO
AI automations that remove admin drag

cart.title: Checkout-ready commerce flow.
cart.body: Wire this page to Stripe Checkout or a regional payment provider while preserving the Order and OrderItem models.

checkout.title: Complete your digital order.
checkout.body: This screen is Stripe-ready and can be connected to any payment provider before launch.
checkout.mockNotice: Demo checkout: no real payment is charged.

opsCards.title: Secure by design
opsCards.body: Credential auth, Prisma adapter, JWT sessions, RBAC helpers, and upload provider boundaries.
